policy: Existing diagnostics are tracked here so CI can enforce zero new lint diagnostics. Do not add entries without reviewing whether the new diagnostic should be fixed instead.
repaymentPlan: P2-A: retire root assets/*.js diagnostics by either excluding vendored/static theme assets from lint or cleaning them in a dedicated mechanical PR.
P2-B: retire scripts/blogger/setup.mjs diagnostics after confirming setup script runtime paths.
P2-C: retire the remaining TypeScript diagnostics in typed app/package code before tightening lint to zero-baseline.
